untranslatable_reason: Pattern identification (Broadening Wedge, Descending configuration) requires visual/geometric pattern recognition not available in allowed indicators. The signal references specific entry conditions based on pattern shape/structure, throwback avoidance post-breakout, and volume trends correlated with breakout direction—none of which can be precisely expressed using only price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, or Volume indicators without custom pattern detection logic.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the volume behavior mentioned (falling volume for upside, rising for downside) and post-breakout pullback avoidance as a reversal signal, but the core pattern identification and breakout direction determination cannot be automated with standard technical indicators alone. Recommend implementing a custom pattern detector for Broadening Wedge configurations.
